ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "title_of_courtesy" TEXT /* Title of courtesy for the employee */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the employee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the employee lives */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state of the employee */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the employee's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the employee */,
  "home_phone" TEXT /* Home phone number of the employee */,
  "extension" INTEGER /* Extension number for the employee */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the employee */,
  "reports_to" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's direct manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary office location of the employee */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status of the employee */,
  "start_salary" TEXT /* Initial salary at the time of hiring */,
  "current_salary" TEXT /* Current salary of the employee */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary */,
  "national_id" TEXT /* National identification number of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_title FOREIGN KEY ("title") REFERENCES titles ("title_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_reports_to FOREIGN KEY ("reports_to") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent department (for hierarchical structures) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_parent_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "level" TEXT /* Hierarchical level of the job title (e.g., Entry, Mid, Senior) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the office location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state of the location */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Main office phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who conducted the review */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next performance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the training course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the course in hours */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the training course (e.g., Technical, Soft Skills) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Name of the course provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee enrolled */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee completed the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the enrollment (e.g., Enrolled, Completed, In Progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES training_courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
